overall.description: A third-person gameplay clip from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through a futuristic urban intersection. The scene transitions from peaceful exploration to active combat as the character encounters hostile NPCs taking cover behind a wrecked vehicle. The environment features towering glass skyscrapers, palm trees, and cyberpunk commercial storefronts under a partly cloudy sky.

events.description: stepping from concrete sidewalk onto asphalt crosswalk
futuristic vehicle passes by on the right side of the street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the city sidewalk toward the intersection, palm trees lining the path

entered.detail: tall glass tower with distinctive red structural accents and multiple billboards
tropical palm tree lining the sidewalk
modern commercial structure with glass facades and ground floor shops
multi-story commercial building with dark tinted windows
modern street light pole with rectangular fixture

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city sidewalk with the camera following the player character toward a major intersection. A distinctive skyscraper with red accents dominates the skyline ahead. The environment is calm with sparse traffic and no pedestrians visible as the character approaches the crosswalk.

events.description: entering the open intersection revealing wrecked vehicles and hostile NPCs
hostile NPCs detected taking cover behind the wrecked brown car, combat begins

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection diagonally while approaching the hostile encounter near the wrecked vehicle

notable_agents.action: hostile NPC crouching behind wrecked car taking cover
hostile NPC moving behind the Thorton truck for cover

entered.detail: rusted brown sedan with broken windows serving as cover for combatants
blue pickup truck with 'THORTON' branding on the tailgate
circular metal manhole cover in the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wide intersection where two abandoned vehicles dominate the space. A wrecked brown car sits in the center while a blue Thorton truck blocks the left side. Hostile NPCs emerge from behind cover, initiating a combat encounter as the character moves deeper into the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: active combat zone with multiple combatants

events.description: player character with red hair engages in firefight with hostile NPCs
hostile NPC falls to the ground after being shot near the wrecked car

agents.ego_description: engaging hostile NPCs using the wrecked car for cover, firing weapon at enemies

notable_agents.action: hostile NPC leaning over wrecked car firing weapon at player
hostile NPC advancing from behind the Thorton truck

segments.scene_description: Active combat engulfs the intersection as the player character exchanges fire with multiple hostile NPCs. The wrecked car serves as central cover while combatants flank from the Thorton truck. Gunfire and tactical movement dominate the scene as the character maneuvers around the vehicles to engage targets.

events.description: moving past the Thorton truck while exiting the combat area
leaving the immediate combat zone behind, returning to open street

agents.ego_description: moving past the combat site and abandoned vehicles, surveying the area

notable_agents.action: remaining hostile NPC retreating toward commercial building

entered.detail: row of commercial storefronts visible beyond the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the Thorton truck, leaving the active combat zone behind. Both the wrecked car and truck fall behind as the camera continues through the intersection toward the commercial buildings on the far side. The immediate threat diminishes as the character exits the combat area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic city intersection that transforms from a quiet urban stroll into a chaotic combat encounter. It begins on a calm sidewalk, following the player character toward a major crosswalk dominated by a red-accented skyscraper in the distance. As the character enters the wide intersection, the atmosphere shifts abruptly when hostile NPCs emerge from behind a wrecked brown car and a blue Thorton truck to initiate a firefight. The scene then intensifies into active combat, with the camera maneuvering around the vehicles as the character exchanges fire and takes cover amidst the wreckage. Finally, the camera pushes past the Thorton truck and leaves the combat zone behind, moving toward the commercial buildings on the far side as the immediate threat diminishes.
